creator: root@tomqnx.com
text:
When pgsql (PostgreSQL) is started, it dies immediately with 
mesg: /dev/console: Operation not permitted
	
The startup script in /usr/local/etc/rc.d does an 'su -l pgsql" before
starting the job, causing a permissions problem accessing /dev/console
directly.

How-To-Repeat: re-boot the system
